direction: Mix — each variant explores a different direction

variants.A: Sports broadcast energy — ESPN/NFL app feel, bold type, team color moments
variants.B: Premium intelligence — Bloomberg/Stripe refined, data-rich, sophisticated
variants.C: Mobile-first app — FotMob/F1 compact, swipeable, native-feeling
variants.D: Editorial sports — The Athletic/Sports Illustrated, story-forward, magazine layout
variants.E: Game day dashboard — Live scoreboard energy, dense data, real-time feel
